model.label: MiMo-V2-Flash
model.description: MiMo • Flash-tier model configured through a custom endpoint for fast inference and lightweight agent tasks.

pick.rationale: Tennessee holds a decisive edge in overall team quality, ranking 15th in both KenPom and Torvik with a top-15 defense that should disrupt SMU's offense, which has shown recent vulnerability with a late-season slump and an injury to key guard BJ Edwards. While SMU's offense is potent on paper, their defensive rating is significantly weaker (95th in Torvik), and Tennessee's experience in the SEC provides better preparation for tournament pressure. The underdog's path relies on SMU's shooting and forcing turnovers, but Tennessee's disciplined defense and superior efficiency metrics make them the more reliable pick to advance.

reasoningStep.title: Team Quality and Efficiency Analysis
reasoningStep.summary: Tennessee is ranked 15th in both KenPom and Torvik, with a top-15 defense (adjde 95.5) that should contain SMU's offense. SMU is ranked 42nd with a weaker defense (adjde 104.9), creating a clear efficiency gap.
reasoningStep.evidence: Tennessee: KenPom 15, Torvik 15, adjde 95.5 (13th). SMU: KenPom 42, Torvik 42, adjde 104.9 (95th).

toolCalls.summary: Returned combined Torvik/KenPom ratings for 2 teams.

toolCalls.summary: Fetched https://www.usatoday.com/story/sports/college/university-of-tennessee/mens-basketball/2026/03/06/tennessee-basketball-injury-update-nate-ament-bishop-boswell-vanderbilt/89026121007/ and extracted 2120 characters of text.

result.text: Tennessee basketball injury update, Nate Ament on report vs Vanderbilt Skip to main content Home NCAAB NCAAW MLB Women's Sports NFL NBA NCAAF WNBA Sports Betting Big Ten Sports SEC Sports Boxing Coaches Salaries Draft Hub Fantasy Football For The Win Formula 1 Golfweek High School Sports High School Sports Awards IndyCar MMA NASCAR National Signing Day NHL Olympics Soccer Sports Business Sports Pulse Sports Seriously Tennis WWE Youth Sports Outdoors Fantasy Bet With the People Clear Play Arizona Sports Indiana Sports Michigan Sports Ohio Sports Tennessee Sports Wisconsin Teams For Subscribers Tennessee basketball injury update, includes Nate Ament vs Vanderbilt Wynton Jackson Knoxville News Sentinel Several players appeared on the availability report for Tennessee basketball on March 6. Nate Ament, Bishop Boswell and Troy Henderson all showed up on the report ahead of the No. 25 Vols (21-9, 11-6) regular season finale against No. 22 Vanderbilt (23-7, 10-7) at Food City Center on March 7 (2 p.m. ET, ESPN). Ament , the 6-foot-10 freshman forward, is doubtful with a right leg injury, which Tennessee basketball coach Rick Barnes has described as a high ankle sprain. He missed his first game of the season when the Vols defeated South Carolina, 78-59, on March 3. Starting guard Bishop Boswell and reserve guard Troy Henderson are both probable. Henderson has been dealing with a shoulder injury that initially kept him out of Tennessee's win at Alabama on Jan. 24. Boswell has an illness that prevented from being at practice on March 6. Reserve freshman guard Clarence Massamba is questionable to play with a right hip injury that has sidelined him unavailable for several games. Wynton Jackson covers high school sports for Knox News. modelTrace.content:
You are an analyst predicting a single March Madness game inside a bracket run.
You have live tools. Use them before making a pick when they can reduce uncertainty.
You are not filling the whole bracket in one response. Predict only the current game.
Use prior picks as already committed bracket state.
You may use at most 10 tool rounds before you must finalize your answer.
Before making a pick, investigate relevant context such as injuries or availability concerns, recent team news, prior head-to-head results when useful, and multiple raw statistics from the available ratings and matchup data.
Take a holistic approach. Balance team quality, matchup specifics, health, form, schedule context, and upset risk instead of relying on one metric.
Do not force an upset, but explicitly consider whether the underdog has a credible path to win and let that affect confidence and rationale.
Return strict JSON only.
Final JSON keys: pick, reasoningStep.
pick must contain gameId, winnerId, confidence, rationale.
The rationale must be a short paragraph of 2 to 4 sentences explaining why the winner was chosen.
reasoningStep must contain id, title, summary, evidence.

Tournament year: 2026
Current game id: r64-midwest-5
Current game label: Midwest 6/11
Round: Round of 64
Resolved teams: Tennessee (tennessee) vs SMU (smu)
Prior committed picks: 32
